description: Legacy Regulation Providers (LRPs) are sovereign states, regional unions, and international bodies and their regulations. Platform kernel contracts and EPSCOM policies are NOT LRPs.

epscom.name: EPSCOM Core Regulations
epscom.description: Supreme platform regulations. Always highest priority over all LRPs. Not an LRP.

platform_contracts.name: dynAEP Action Lattice
platform_contracts.description: Runtime event governance contract. Registered by Base Node bootstrap. Not an LRP.

platform_contracts.name: Lattice Channel Default Contract
platform_contracts.description: PQEncryptedCapsule transport contract. Registered by Base Node bootstrap. Not an LRP.

platform_contracts.name: AEP 2.75 15-Step Evaluation Chain
platform_contracts.description: Optional validation-engine eval chain. Enable via base_node.lrps when using a validation dock. Not an LRP.

platform_contracts.name: GAP Runtime Scanners
platform_contracts.description: Optional GAP 11-scanner bundle when gap-server is installed. Not an LRP.

platform_contracts.name: Commerce Subprotocol
platform_contracts.description: Commerce and spend-cap subprotocol. Not an LRP.

lrps.name: EU AI Act
lrps.description: EU AI Act compliance checking pack. One definition file, one gate. Not a legal certification.

lrps.name: GDPR
lrps.description: EU data protection: lawful basis, minimisation, subject rights and breach evidence.

lrps.name: SOC 2 Type II
lrps.description: Trust service criteria for access control, monitoring, incident response and change management.

lrps.name: HIPAA
lrps.description: US healthcare safeguards for access, audit, integrity, authentication and transmission.

lrps.name: NIST AI RMF
lrps.description: NIST AI Risk Management Framework govern, map, measure and manage functions.

lrps.name: ISO 42001
lrps.description: AI management system requirements for documented controls and continual improvement.
